title: Races
summary: Category exposes three faction articles.
current_ui_note: The simulator separately confirms the three names; Help traits are historical.

title: Game goal
summary: Crystals, three faction obelisks, and an SSG form the historical alliance endgame.
limits: SSG construction follows three obelisks and ten crystals

title: Galaxy Overview
summary: Historical galaxy topology has galaxies, systems, suns and planet fields.
limits: Help states 20 galaxies maximum; historical only

title: Planet Overview
summary: Planet is a local hub with three zones and separate process categories.
limits: Help documents one owned-planet destruction per 24h; not tested

title: Resources Overview
summary: Economic resources are Metal, Minerals and Gas; energy, ozone, scrap and population/hangar are described separately.
limits: insufficient free population blocks unit construction

title: Buildings Overview
summary: Buildings have levels, maxima, prerequisites, economic-resource and energy costs.

title: Science Overview
summary: Science grants bonuses/unlocks and has a single shared research queue across planets.
limits: only one Additional science per player

title: Ships Overview
summary: Ships are grouped by role and can require Shipyard, science, resources and free population.

title: Commander Ships Overview
summary: Special one-off, repairable commander units with Admiral gates; only the leading commander ability applies in battle.

title: Defence Overview
summary: Defence units are planet-bound and use shipyard/science/resource/population gates.

title: Admiral Overview
summary: Battle points increase Admiral level, which gates commander ships and skill progression.

title: Renegades Overview
summary: NPC encounters use tiers and time-limited system presence; successful/draw attacks yield upgrade points.
limits: one renegade per system at a time

title: Flights Overview
summary: Twelve regular-planet flight types plus team-planet missions are documented.
limits: at least one ship per flight
Space trip and Sun attack are not speed-motivated

title: Alliance Overview
summary: Alliances use membership, leadership, policies and team-planet cooperation.

title: Battles overview
summary: Battles group units, use target priorities, and end in win/loss/draw with configurable 5/8/12 round cap.

title: Profile Overview
summary: Profile exposes point progress and editable presentation/social fields.

title: Rankings Overview
summary: Player and alliance rankings include resource, battle, total and achievement-related progress.

title: Achievements
summary: Achievements are requirement-based goals with points and historical reward types.

title: Services Overview
summary: Services use historical premium currencies and can alter process timing or task options.

title: Galaxy Arena and Tournaments
availability: opened with battle and tournament articles
summary: Optional cross-universe arena has registration, one-hour rounds, 12-round fights, tokens/glory and tournaments.

title: New units statistics
summary: Article explicitly says its custom ship/defence configuration applies only to some universes.
